DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen L. Collier (415-771-9850) of Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., for Larry Doss, plaintiff and opposing party; No other appearance

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BRYANT PHUONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled ten (10) days to answer, failed to comply with CRC 3.1320(d). Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen L. Collier (415-771-9850) of Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., for Larry Doss, plaintiff and opposing party; No other appearance

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs THE WAYLAND LLC, GUY FONG, WA LI and BRYANT PHUONG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied - sufficient re conscious disregard of rights and safety. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Jan-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BRYANT PHUONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on January 11, 2013. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Jan-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS THE WAYLAND LLC, GUY FONG, WA LI, BRYANT PHUONG MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on January 11, 2013. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen D. Flaherty, Esq., 805.497.7706 x118, for Defendants The Wayland LLC. Guy Fong, Wa Li and Bryant Phuong; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRYANT PHUONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion to December 11, 2012 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than December 4, 2012 at 4:00 pm, or the demurrer will be overruled. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen D. Flaherty, Esq., 805.497.7706 x118, for Defendants The Wayland LLC. Guy Fong, Wa Li and Bryant Phuong; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE WAYLAND LLC, GUY FONG, WA LI, BRYANT PHUONG'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion December 11, 2012 to give Defendants the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than December 4, 2012 at 4:00 pm, or the motion to strike will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
